title: FATHIYA Automation Architecture — LLM as Transformation Layer
source_files: المعمارية العامة_ نموذج لغة كطبقة تحويل وسطى.docx
دليل شامل لقدرات ChatGPT وإعداداته وتطبيقاته وكيف تحصل على أقصى استفادة.docx
summary: Architecture principle: the LLM operates as a transformation layer. Orchestration, state management, receipts, adapters, and audit live outside the model. Multi-agent design uses adversarial selection then cooperative synthesis.
key_principles: LLM as transformation layer: the model transforms input into structured output, but does not own state or orchestration.
Orchestration lives outside the model: queues, routing, scheduling, and execution control are system-level concerns.
State management is external: runtime queue, receipt ledger, and awareness state persist independently of any model session.
Adapters bridge the model to external tools: each adapter has a tool contract defining allowed actions and side effects.
Audit is a first-class concern: every transformation produces a receipt, and every receipt is ledger-linked.
Multi-agent learning/product design uses adversarial selection (challenge phase) then cooperative synthesis (build phase).
boundary: Architecture documentation only. Does not modify system architecture or deploy changes.
